title: Chabaqquwq #2265
definition:
Habakkuk = "embrace"

 1) a prophet of Israel who wrote the book by that name; probably
    lived about the 12th or 13th year of the reign of Josiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Habakkuk = "embrace"

 1) a prophet of Israel who wrote the book by that name; probably
    lived about the 12th or 13th year of the reign of Josiah

    NASB:  a Heb. prophet
